slides.title: usePrevious – Track Previous Value 📅
useLocalStorage – Sync with localStorage 💾

quizData.question: Why does `usePrevious` use a ref instead of state?

options.text: Because updating a ref doesn't cause a re-render, which is perfect for storing previous value
Because you can't use state inside custom hooks
Because refs are easier to use

quizData.explanation: We want to store the previous value without triggering a re-render; refs are ideal for that.
